notes: Stored from a user paste so future rescans can use the pasted Daisies menu text without refetching the website.
The pasted menus explicitly mention pine nuts, hazelnuts, almond, peanut butter, pecan, almond praline, and pistachio.
The pasted menus also explicitly note that gluten-free substitutions are available, including pasta substitutions that need additional prep time.
